title: SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized housing and affordable rental unit programs. 2251 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Subsidized housing: Individuals who are 62 and older and adults with disabilities Affordable housing: Income limits and background check status varies by property. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. First Thursday of the month 10am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 779-5785 1000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-5785 Main phone (541) 857-1118 FAX Main phone (541) 779-5785 ext 1000 Application (541) 779-5785 ext 1603 Applications Coordinator [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None to get on waitlists. Rents and other costs may vary per individual rental units. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY
